page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program for predicting coding sequences from low quality cDNA. To achieve error-tolerant prediction, it uses a machine-learning approach, which makes better expression of coding sequence maximizing the use of limited information from input sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program for predicting coding sequences from low quality cDNA. To achieve error-tolerant prediction, it uses a machine-learning approach, which makes better expression of coding sequence maximizing the use of limited information from input sequences.
